description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular tabletop with a raised edge and a single central drawer adorned with a round knob. The drawer front is decorated with vertical fluting and a shaped lower edge, adding a touch of classic elegance. Four slender, tapered legs support the structure, each with subtle carved details near the top. A lower shelf connects the legs, providing additional storage or display space. The overall finish is a smooth, light gray, giving the piece a refined and neutral appearance. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for placement in a variety of urban settings.
description: A light gray nightstand with a single fluted drawer, round knob, tapered legs, and a lower shelf, featuring classic decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fluted drawer with a round knob and the lower shelf between the four legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand, the plain side panel, and the profile of the legs and shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat back panel with no drawer or handle, and the lower shelf visible between the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and the structure of the legs and shelf.
attribute_leg_design: tapered wooden legs with carved details
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
